step_rationale: CC chemokine; drives monocyte recruitment and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: MCP-3 recruits monocytes into the atherosclerotic plaque, amplifying vascular inflammation and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Circulating virome and inflammatory proteome in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction and primary ventricular fibrillation.
